## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in between Ramp and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, progress, and upcoming projects.](https://fathom.video/share/zTNGvyHNrnopDeqdzsMYsbsVCEhsEcuB?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content focus: Expense category pages (50 published, 44 pending) + upcoming Brex page updates](https://fathom.video/share/zTNGvyHNrnopDeqdzsMYsbsVCEhsEcuB?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [Strong performance: 53 published articles showing positive growth trends](https://fathom.video/share/zTNGvyHNrnopDeqdzsMYsbsVCEhsEcuB?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
  - [New priorities: Complete expense categories, refresh credit card content, prepare for vendor network project](https://fathom.video/share/zTNGvyHNrnopDeqdzsMYsbsVCEhsEcuB?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
  - [Future projects: Exploring hotel/restaurant content leveraging Ramp's transaction data + external sources](https://fathom.video/share/zTNGvyHNrnopDeqdzsMYsbsVCEhsEcuB?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

## Topics

### Team Introductions and Roles

      - [Matt: Owns editorial function, potential Air Ops user for refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/zTNGvyHNrnopDeqdzsMYsbsVCEhsEcuB?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)
      - [Victoria: Owns vendor network and accounting pillars](https://fathom.video/share/zTNGvyHNrnopDeqdzsMYsbsVCEhsEcuB?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
  - [GrowthX team structure clarified:](https://fathom.video/share/zTNGvyHNrnopDeqdzsMYsbsVCEhsEcuB?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
      - [Bisera: Leads content initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/zTNGvyHNrnopDeqdzsMYsbsVCEhsEcuB?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
      - [Jimmy & Kyle: SEO strategy, backlinks, technical SEO](https://fathom.video/share/zTNGvyHNrnopDeqdzsMYsbsVCEhsEcuB?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)

1.  Complete expense category pages (50 initial, then remainder)
2.  Start Brex page updates next week
3.  Credit card content refreshes (Ali provided feedback on no annual fee card)
4.  Vendor network project (spec coming next Wednesday)
